# User template — Ads (English)

## Placeholders

`{{channel}}` `{{product}}` `{{tone}}` `{{offer}}` `{{constraints}}` `{{audience}}`

## Template

"Create ad copy for `{{channel}}` promoting `{{product}}` in `{{tone}}` tone. Offer: `{{offer}}`. Audience: `{{audience}}`. Constraints: `{{constraints}}`."

## Filled examples

1. "Create Meta ad copy for **Villa Mare Resort** in **Persuasive / Sales** tone. Offer: stay 4 nights, pay for 3. Audience: Egyptian families planning Eid trips. Constraints: avoid exaggerated claims, include availability urgency."

2. "Create Google Search ad copy for **NilePay app** in **Professional Premium** tone. Offer: free onboarding + instant transfers. Audience: freelancers and online sellers. Constraints: short headlines, compliance-safe language."
